expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves component-stack constraints, embedding lifecycle assumptions, and integration-sensitive customer expectations
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus and breaks it into the three required areas under “What Phase 1 must preserve”: “component-stack constraints”, “Embedding lifecycle assumptions”, and “Integration-sensitive customer expectations”, and ties it to native-embedding signals and the customer signal (CVS/CS0928640). It repeatedly notes it “Cannot verify” due to missing artifacts, but the focus is explicitly covered.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly Phase 1-scoped (“NE-P1… — Phase 1 (Context Intake) Contract Check”, “Determination (phase1-only)”, “This is a phase1 alignment check; no later-phase artifacts… are applicable”), and evaluates Phase 1 contract items (spawn manifest requirement, support-only/non-defect routing policy) without performing defect analysis.
